allow: WebFetch(domain:github.com)
Bash(dotnet build *)
Bash(dotnet run *)
Bash(xargs sed -i 's/NagetiveViewModel/NavigationViewModel/g')
Bash(xargs sed -i 's/NagetiveCurdVeiwModel/CrudViewModel/g')
Bash(xargs sed -i 's/using IndustrySystem.Presentation.Wpf.ViewModels.Dialogs;/using IndustrySystem.Presentation.Wpf.ViewModels.ExperimentParameters;/g')

Bash(sed -i 's|<materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="TuneVariant" Style="{StaticResource PageHeaderPackIcon}"/>|<TextBlock Text="\\" Style="{StaticResource PageHeaderMdl2Icon}"/>|g' ExperimentConfigView.xaml)

Bash(sed -i 's|<materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="FormatListChecks" Style="{StaticResource PageHeaderPackIcon}"/>|<TextBlock Text="\\" Style="{StaticResource PageHeaderMdl2Icon}"/>|g' ExperimentGroupsView.xaml)

Bash(sed -i 's|<materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="FlaskOutline" Style="{StaticResource PageHeaderPackIcon}"/>|<TextBlock Text="\\" Style="{StaticResource PageHeaderMdl2Icon}"/>|g' ExperimentTemplateView.xaml)
Bash(sed -i 's|<materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="Warehouse" Style="{StaticResource PageHeaderPackIcon}"/>|<TextBlock Text="\\" Style="{StaticResource PageHeaderMdl2Icon}"/>|g' InventoryView.xaml)

Bash(sed -i 's|<materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="PackageVariant" Style="{StaticResource PageHeaderPackIcon}"/>|<TextBlock Text="\\" Style="{StaticResource PageHeaderMdl2Icon}"/>|g' MaterialInfoView.xaml)

Bash(sed -i 's|<materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="PackageVariant" Width="24" Height="24" Foreground="White" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,12,0"/>|<TextBlock Text="\\" FontFamily="Segoe MDL2 Assets" FontSize="20" Foreground="White" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,12,0"/>|g' ContainerEditDialog.xaml)

Bash(sed -i 's|<materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="PackageVariant" Width="24" Height="24" Foreground="White" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,12,0"/>|<TextBlock Text="\\" FontFamily="Segoe MDL2 Assets" FontSize="20" Foreground="White" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,12,0"/>|g' ContainerListDialog.xaml)

Bash(sed -i 's|<materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="Plus" Width="18" Height="18" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>|<TextBlock Text="\\" FontFamily="Segoe MDL2 Assets" FontSize="16" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>|g' ContainerListDialog.xaml)

Bash(sed -i 's|<materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="ViewGrid" Width="24" Height="24" Foreground="White" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,12,0"/>|<TextBlock Text="\\" FontFamily="Segoe MDL2 Assets" FontSize="20" Foreground="White" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,12,0"/>|g' ShelfEditDialog.xaml)

Bash(sed -i 's|<materialDesign:PackIcon Kind="ViewGrid" Width="24" Height="24" Foreground="White" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,12,0"/>|<TextBlock Text="\\" FontFamily="Segoe MDL2 Assets" FontSize="20" Foreground="White" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,12,0"/>|g' ShelfListDialog.xaml)
Bash(sed -i 's/Foreground="#1D2939"/Foreground="{DynamicResource AppPrimaryTextBrush}"/g' RunExperimentView.xaml)
Bash(sed -i 's/Foreground="#667085"/Foreground="{DynamicResource AppMutedTextBrush}"/g' RunExperimentView.xaml)
Bash(sed -i 's/Foreground="#94A3B8"/Foreground="{DynamicResource AppTertiaryTextBrush}"/g' RunExperimentView.xaml)
Bash(sed -i 's/Foreground="#0078D4"/Foreground="{DynamicResource AppChipForegroundBrush}"/g' RunExperimentView.xaml)
Bash(sed -i 's/Foreground="#DC3545"/Foreground="{DynamicResource ErrorBrush}"/g' RunExperimentView.xaml)
Bash(sed -i 's|<Setter Property="Fill" Value="#DC3545"/>|<Setter Property="Fill" Value="{DynamicResource ErrorBrush}"/>|g' RunExperimentView.xaml)
Bash(sed -i 's|<Setter Property="Fill" Value="#10893E"/>|<Setter Property="Fill" Value="{DynamicResource SuccessBrush}"/>|g' RunExperimentView.xaml)
Bash(sed -i 's|<Setter Property="Background" Value="#22888888"/>|<Setter Property="Background" Value="{DynamicResource AppOverlayMutedBrush}"/>|g' RunExperimentView.xaml)
Bash(sed -i 's|<Setter Property="Background" Value="#2210893E"/>|<Setter Property="Background" Value="{DynamicResource AppOverlaySuccessBrush}"/>|g' RunExperimentView.xaml)
Bash(sed -i 's|<Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF0078D4"/>|<Setter Property="Background" Value="{DynamicResource AppButtonPrimaryBackgroundBrush}"/>|g' RunExperimentView.xaml)

Bash(sed -i 's|Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#EEF5FF"|Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="{DynamicResource AppListRowHoverBrush}"|g' RunExperimentView.xaml)

Bash(sed -i 's|Setter TargetName="border" Property="BorderBrush" Value="#0078D4"|Setter TargetName="border" Property="BorderBrush" Value="{DynamicResource AppChipForegroundBrush}"|g' RunExperimentView.xaml)

Bash(sed -i 's|Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#F8FAFC"|Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="{DynamicResource AppListHeaderBrush}"|g' RunExperimentView.xaml)
Bash(sed -i 's|<Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFCB8400"/>|<Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{DynamicResource WarningBrush}"/>|g' RunExperimentView.xaml)
Bash(sed -i '45s/.*/                    <!-- MDL2 glyph \\ \(FlaskOutline equivalent\) -->/' "src/Presentation/IndustrySystem.Presentation.Wpf/Views/Dialogs/MaterialEditDialog.xaml")

Bash(sed -i '46s/.*/                    <TextBlock Text="\\" FontFamily="Segoe MDL2 Assets" FontSize="20" Foreground="White"/' "src/Presentation/IndustrySystem.Presentation.Wpf/Views/Dialogs/MaterialEditDialog.xaml")

Bash(sed -i '47s/.*/                               HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"\\/>/' "src/Presentation/IndustrySystem.Presentation.Wpf/Views/Dialogs/MaterialEditDialog.xaml")
Bash(grep -v ':0$')
Bash(git diff *)
Bash(taskkill /F /PID 4196)
Bash(dotnet clean *)
Bash(git add *)
